title: dacryodes rostrata
intro: Dacryodes rostrata, also known as the African oil palm, is a species of palm tree native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its oil, which has been used to treat various health issues such as skin infections, wounds, and inflammation due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dacryodes rostrata include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and even have anti-cancer properties. The oil extracted from this plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as ointments, creams, and capsules, for topical and internal use.
